name: Appraisal Penalty Exception

eligibility.description: Applies to property valuations used for charitable deductions, estate taxes, or gift taxes where the appraisal is challenged by the IRS.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoids penalties for valuation misstatements if the appraiser can establish that the value provided was 'more likely than not' the proper value.
